seoTitle: Elizabeth Island vs Ellaswood — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Elizabeth Island and Ellaswood. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Elizabeth Island vs Ellaswood: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Elizabeth Island and Ellaswood.
heading: Elizabeth Island vs Ellaswood — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Elizabeth Island, Victoria and Ellaswood, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ellaswood has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Elizabeth Island (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Elizabeth Island or Ellaswood safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Elizabeth Island has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Ellaswood scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Elizabeth Island scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Ellaswood scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Elizabeth Island or Ellaswood?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ellaswood has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
